title: Armor Stand Arms
description: Armor stands have arms by default!
body:
![minecraft datapack armor stand arms mod auto arms armor stand arm](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/titles/armor_stand_arms.png?t=11421)
[![jodeks discord - discord badge - pixel badge - pixel discord badge - jodeks datapacks - datapacks discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Discord.png)](https://discord.gg/z2n3qTzQY6)   [![datapacks jodek youtube](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/YouTube.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@jodek)   [![armor stand arms minecraft datapack github issues](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Issues.png)](https://github.com/jodeks-datapacks//issues)   [![jodeks datapacks kofi - jodek kofi - minecraft datapack kofi donation]( https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Kofi.png)](https://ko-fi.com/jodek)   [![github sponsor jodek donation datapacks minecraft](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Sponsor.png)](https://github.com/sponsors/Jodekq)
## Features **1.** Automatically adds arms to armor stands when placed **2.** [1.21+] Shift + right click an armor stand to show / hide the arms **3.** [1.21.6+] Settings with `/trigger armor_stand_arms.config` - Enable / disable the shift + right click feature **Remove all arms** ``` /function armor_stand_arms:app/arms/remove_all ``` **Show all arms** ``` /function armor_stand_arms:app/arms/show_all ``` ## Showcase ## Below 1.21 Features If you want to **remove the arms** from **only one armor stand** run: ``` /trigger remove_arms ``` and to **enable** them again run ``` /trigger show_arms ``` For that to work without complications: Go as near as you can to the armor stand and use /trigger
